subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1914-11-08
subcodes.first_line: The tempest in the Atlantic ocean is very spectacular. It is a world of water.... When I was a very young child in Tihran, there was a man by the name of Abbas Quli Khan
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
